name: llama.cpp — Phi-4 (CPU)
description: CPU-only OpenAI-compatible chat server (llama.cpp) running Microsoft Phi-4 as a Q4_K_M GGUF quantization. On startup llama.cpp downloads the GGUF from the Hugging Face Hub (-hf), then serves /v1/chat/completions on port 8080. No GPU required. Note: vLLM's published image is CUDA-only, so this CPU template uses llama.cpp instead; the model is downloaded then run locally just like the vLLM templates.
